title: Tao Te Ching 58
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 58 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 58 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: When the government is dull and sleepy, the people are wholesome. When the government is sharp and alert, the people are cunning.
